ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_CCR_Validation_Rules__c), OR( CONTAINS(Opportunity__r.ETM_Region__c, 'UK-PUBLIC'), CONTAINS(Opportunity__r.ETM_Region__c, 'UK-PUBLIC2') ), ISPICKVAL(CCR_Type__c, 'Partner Referral Fee'), ISNEW() )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Public Sector opportunities are not eligible for Partner Referral Fees.
